statement: In every magma, Equation 1214 (`x = y * ((z * (w * w)) * z)`) implies Equation 3212 (`x = (((y * z) * z) * x) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0827
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op w w)) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) z) x) z)
